{{Quote|The way I see it, it's not who you are, but who you know in this galaxy that counts!|Revidjasa|<ref name="Heroes & Rogues">''[[Heroes & Rogues]]''</ref>}}
'''Revidjasa''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] present in [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].

==Biography==
[[File:Revidjasa_SWI_143.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Revidjasa in Jabba's Palace]]
Revidjasa was a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] crimelord finding success in slaving and extortion before being noticed by [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]], who eliminated the Rodian's inner circle until only Revidjasa remained. Under threat of being removed from power, he was forced to work under Jabba's rules and hated the Hutt for it.<ref name="GG11">''[[Galaxy Guide 11: Criminal Organizations]]''</ref>

The Rodians Revidjasa and [[Beedo/Legends|Beedo]] were occupied at a pair of [[Slot machine/Legends|slot machines]] when [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] arrived at Jabba's Palace just before the [[Rescue of Han Solo/Legends|rescue]] of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]. Oblivious to the pair's entry, it was not until the [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2 unit's]] [[Holoprojector/Legends|holoprojector]] lit up that the pair turned away to listen to [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] request of an audience with [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]].<ref name="RotJ" /> Later, Revidjasa took to a shadowed alcove, in the company of [[Bib Fortuna/Legends|Bib Fortuna]] and [[Jess/Legends|Jess]], while watching the [[Max Rebo Band/Legends|Max Rebo Band's]] performance of [[Jedi Rocks/Legends|''Jedi Rocks'']]. [[Beedo/Legends|Beedo]] meanwhile, danced alongside a [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]].<ref name="RotJ" />

[[File:Beedo_and_Revidjasa_SW_TAFA.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Beedo and Revidjasa at slot machines in Jabba's Palace]]
Following Jabba's death, Revidjasa made key alliances with [[Zygerrian/Legends|Zygerrian]] and [[Thalassian/Legends|Thalassian]] cartels, effectively taking over Jabba's slaving operations in the Mid Rim. He was believed to be on his way to becoming a permanent fixture in that region during the struggle between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] and the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].<ref name="GG11" />

Some time following the death of Jabba, Revidjasa's left arm was replaced by an undisguised [[Cybernetics/Legends|cybernetic]] one, which proved to be an advantage in physical fighting.<ref name="GG11" />

==Behind the scenes==
Revidjasa was portrayed by [[Gail Hunter]]<ref name="Actor">''[[The Making of Return of the Jedi]]'' lists [[Gail Hunter]] and [[Marolyn Turk]] as portraying the two [[Rodian/Legends|Rodians]] in {{Film|VI}}. As {{SW|url=news/star-wars-in-the-uk-memorabilia-23-24-november-2013|text=Star Wars in the UK: Memorabilia, 23-24 November 2013}} lists Turk as playing [[Beedo/Legends|Beedo]], the other Rodian in the film, Hunter must portray Revidjasa.</ref> in the [[1983]] [[original trilogy]] film, [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']].<ref name="RotJ" />
